description: Supabase dashboard - Project detail page with settings, configuration, and resources

components.name: breadcrumb
components.description: Navigation breadcrumb showing path (e.g., Org > my-project > Settings)
components.html_snippet: Projects/my-project

components.name: tabs
components.description: Tab navigation with multiple content panels. Includes active indicator and content switching.

components.name: metric-card
components.description: Stat or metric display card showing key project statistics (requests, storage, users, etc.)
components.html_snippet:
API Requests

45.2K

+12% this month

components.name: alert
components.description: Alert or notification message. Shows warnings, errors, or informational notices.
components.html_snippet:
Alert Title

Alert message content goes here

components.name: form-field
components.description: Form input with label, placeholder, and optional validation state. Used in settings and configuration.

components.name: accordion
components.description: Collapsible section that expands on click to reveal additional content. Used for settings or documentation.
components.html_snippet: Content goes here

components.name: card
components.description: Generic content card with border and rounded corners. Used as container for related content.
components.html_snippet:
Card Title

Card content goes here

components.name: copy-button
components.description: Button that copies text (like API keys or connection strings) to clipboard. Shows feedback on click.

components.name: menu-item
components.description: Menu item in dropdown or context menu. Can have icon, label, and keyboard shortcut.
components.html_snippet: Menu Item⌘K

components.name: tooltip
components.description: Tooltip hint displayed on hover. Shows additional information about UI elements.
components.html_snippet: Tooltip text

components.name: switch
components.description: Toggle switch or checkbox for boolean settings. Indicates on/off state.
